text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "arrived in ER accompanied by RELATIVE due to deterioration of general conditions and marked asthenia.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "The RELATIVE reports a weight loss of 10 kg over approximately two months.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "The patient today reports difficulty walking due to pain in the lower limbs and urinary disorders.", 0.0, 1.0)
